results.label: Standard — education channel subscribe + comment CTAs
results.output_summary: Generated 5 CTA options: 3 subscribe variants (value-promise, community frame, direct ask) and 2 comment CTAs. Each labeled with engagement trigger and ideal placement. Comment CTA ties to shadowing topic: 'Drop your language in the comments — I'm curious what accent you're working toward.' All match warm, teacher-like tone.

A2.note: Each labeled with distinct trigger and placement note.

A3.note: Natural spoken cadence with contractions. Warm encouraging tone consistent.

results.label: Minimal — only required fields
results.output_summary: Generated 4 subscribe CTA variants despite minimal input. Each uses a different trigger: value-promise, direct ask, anti-algorithm, efficiency. All match no-nonsense tone. Short and clean.

A2.note: Distinct triggers labeled with placement notes.

results.label: European context — travel channel with sponsor read
results.output_summary: Generated 6 options: 3 subscribe CTAs and 1 sponsor read for the European adventure insurance brand, plus 2 comment engagement options. Sponsor read transitions naturally from the Scottish Highlands content. Insurance product framed around wild camping and outdoor adventure coverage across EU/UK — European context preserved. Placement notes specify mid-roll for sponsor, end for subscribe.

A1.note: 6 complete scripts including sponsor read. No placeholders.

A2.note: Distinct triggers for each option. Placement notes included.

A3.note: Natural spoken cadence. Adventurous storytelling tone consistent.
